description: When you want to show off your sporty style, there is no better way to do it than with this bag from adidas. Height: 38 cm Width: 32 cm Depth: 18 cm Made of 100% polyester with a nylon lining with two legs on the base and the 3-Stripe running through One main zippered compartment with a separator to hold your laptop One zippered compartment on the front with printed branding Has a zippered pocket on top Padded and adjustable mesh shoulder straps with adidas logo, has Climacool technology Suction points on PU embedded on the straps and back for better support Fabric haul loop for handling ease Care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dirt
